emails.theme: Ranking the 5 Most Popular Men's Chains (YouTube Spotlight)
emails.product: Diamond Cut Rope, Round Box, Miami Cuban Link, Hermes, Diamond Cut Franco chains
emails.shortDescription: YouTube spotlight of Nick Miller's video 'Jewelry Designer Ranks Men's Chains (Most Are Junk)'. Video thumbnail hero with play overlay linked to the video, founder hook intro, then the five chain collections as the lineup (image + Shop Now to each collection), closing Watch the Ranking CTA. Nick founder voice, no sign-off, no pricing, no karat range. Lifestyle images from each collection's product pages.
emails.notes: Client brief Jul 8 + 2 layout-inspo PNGs. Video fehnJwo-G_8. Collections + images verified live 200 Jul 8. Ranking order NOT fabricated (video reveals worst-to-best); the five presented as the lineup. Dark/gold Proclamation template.
emails.creativeDirection: Dark #0A0A0A / gold #D4AF37, Trajan/Georgia serif. YouTube thumbnail hero (maxresdefault) + gold play circle, big serif 'The 5 Most Popular Men's Chains, Ranked', founder hook, Watch the Ranking gold CTA; 'The Five in the Ranking' alternating image/text rows (Rope, Round Box, Cuban, Hermes, Franco) each with Shop Now to its collection; closing box + Watch CTA; wordmark footer. Designer: swap any non-on-model chain shots for true lifestyle where available.

emails.theme: Proudly American: Made in USA Best Sellers
emails.product: Best sellers by metal. Gold: Champion Saint Michael, Voyager Compass w/ Diamonds, Stoic 4 Virtues. Silver: Champion Saint Michael, Faith Cross, Spartan. Platinum: Destiny Cross w/ Diamonds, Stoic 4 Virtues.
emails.shortDescription: Second July 4th email (morning send, pairs with the Final Pieces evening last-chance email). Proudly American / Made in USA angle across gold, silver, platinum. Layout replicates client-attached MORETHAN90 reference (hero + offer strip, stacked product cards w/ stars + Shop Now grouped by metal, Built to Last feature, footer nav). Client brief Jul 3.
emails.notes: All 8 pendants verified live + in stock 2026-07-03. Made in USA. No pricing. Star rows are design elements (no invented review counts).
emails.creativeDirection: Replicate attached MORETHAN90 layout in Proclamation black/gold Trajan Pro; hero + gold trust strip; Gold/Silver/Platinum sections each with product cards (image, name, star row, Shop Now); Built to Last feature; footer nav

emails.theme: 4th of July Special: Gold Chains Made in the USA
emails.product: Diamond Cut Franco Chains USA Made: 18k (3mm, 2mm), 14k (4.5mm, 3mm); Signature + Lion clasps upsell
emails.shortDescription: 4th of July, solid gold chains made in the USA. Intro (Miami Cuban, Franco, Hermes, Rope, lifetime warranty), 18k (3mm+2mm) and 14k (4.5mm+3mm) with Explore More CTAs, plus Upgrade to Signature or King's Clasps section. Nick voice, no pricing.
emails.notes: Client brief Jul 1. All featured chains are Diamond Cut Franco USA Made (match mm/karat + Made in USA theme). Explore More -> /collections/mens-chains metal-filtered. Clasps: signature-clasps + lion-clasps collections. No pricing, no sign off.
emails.creativeDirection: Black/gold Proclamation aesthetic, Trajan Pro headings, text brand bar. Hero + intro, 18k 2-card row + Explore More, 14k 2-card row + Explore More, gold clasp image + Signature/Lion clasp CTAs, USA/lifetime-warranty trust line. Shop Now CTAs.

emails.theme: Last Chance: The Final Pieces (America's 250th, not restocking)
emails.product: Spartan, Memento Mori (skull), Vita (diamond skull), The Tiger (gold+silver each)
emails.shortDescription: 4th of July / 250th last-chance email echoing the May Memorial Day final-pieces winner (new layout/copy). These designs are retiring and not being restocked. Nick voice, no pricing, separate Shop Now per piece.
emails.notes: Client brief Jul 2 (repeat of May Memorial Day). Final list: Spartan, Memento Mori, Vita (=Skull, gold-skull-pendant-diamonds + silver-skull-pendant), Tiger. Flower of Life EXCLUDED per client (pages 404). Tiger not hero; Memento Mori skull not tag. Nick voice, no pricing.
emails.creativeDirection: Black/gold Proclamation, Trajan Pro, brand bar. Hero 'The Final Pieces' + last-chance intro, 3 pendant sections (Spartan, Memento Mori, Tiger) each gold+silver with Shop Gold/Shop Silver, closing urgency CTA. Distinct layout from May.
